answer: We keep it simple: Full Reading — $9.90, Compatibility — $9.90, and the best-value bundle Reading + Compatibility — $14.90. Every tier is generated the moment you pay and lands in your inbox.
The built-in deal is the bundle: Reading + Compatibility for $14.90 instead of $19.80 — that's the biggest saving right now. Promo codes may appear later; the bundle is always there.
Right now we accept crypto — card payments are coming soon. Your reading is generated and emailed the moment the payment confirms.
If something went wrong with your order — a wrong birth date, a duplicate payment, or the reading never arrived — write to us and we'll fix it or refund you. Honest product, honest support.
Instantly. The reading is calculated the moment you pay and sent to your email right away — no queues, no waiting days.

Your blueprint is 13 points across four traditions: 9 from numerology (Life Path, Expression, Soul Urge and more), your Sun sign, Chinese zodiac animal and element, and your tarot birth card — each with a full interpretation in the paid reading.
The quiz above is free: enter your name and birth date and we calculate a real slice of your 13-point profile on the spot — no account, no card.
The Compatibility reading ($9.90) looks at how two people fit — connection and conflict style across the key points. For couples the bundle (Reading + Compatibility, $14.90) is the smart pick.
We use your name and birth date only to calculate your reading. Details are in our Privacy Policy (link in the footer).

Every point traces back to a documented framework — Pythagorean numerology, tropical astrology, the Chinese calendar, the Major Arcana. We'd rather be honest than impressive: it's a named method, not "the universe says".
